ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transects" (
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transect */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from a reference point (e.g., park boundary) */,
  "hunt_cat" TEXT /* Hunting category (e.g., None, Moderate, Intense) */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use type (e.g., Park, Logging) */,
  "num_households" INTEGER /* Number of households near the transect */,
  "transect_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the transect */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the transect */,
  "date_established" TEXT /* Date when the transect was established */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted */,
  "transect_length" REAL /* Length of the transect in meters */,
  "transect_width" REAL /* Width of the transect in meters */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the transect in meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the transect */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the transect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation" (
  "veg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation record */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transect (foreign key) */,
  "veg_rich" REAL /* Vegetation richness (number of plant species) */,
  "veg_stems" REAL /* Stem density (number of stems per unit area) */,
  "veg_liana" REAL /* Liana presence (percentage of liana coverage) */,
  "veg_dbh" REAL /* DBH (Diameter at Breast Height) of trees */,
  "veg_canopy" REAL /* Canopy cover (percentage of canopy coverage) */,
  "veg_understory" REAL /* Understory vegetation (percentage of understory coverage) */,
  "veg_date" TEXT /* Date when the vegetation data was collected */,
  "veg_species_list" TEXT /* List of species present in the transect */,
  "veg_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the vegetation */,
  "veg_surveyor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveyor who collected the data (foreign key to users table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("veg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_veg_surveyor_id FOREIGN KEY ("veg_surveyor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_transect_id FOREIGN KEY ("transect_id") REFERENCES transects ("transect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wildlife" (
  "wild_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wildlife record */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transect (foreign key) */,
  "ra_apes" REAL /* Relative abundance of apes */,
  "ra_birds" REAL /* Relative abundance of birds */,
  "ra_elephant" REAL /* Relative abundance of elephants */,
  "ra_monkeys" REAL /* Relative abundance of monkeys */,
  "ra_rodent" REAL /* Relative abundance of rodents */,
  "ra_ungulate" REAL /* Relative abundance of ungulates */,
  "wild_date" TEXT /* Date when the wildlife data was collected */,
  "wild_species_list" TEXT /* List of species present in the transect */,
  "wild_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the wildlife */,
  "wild_surveyor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveyor who collected the data (foreign key to users table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wild_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildlife_transect_id FOREIGN KEY ("transect_id") REFERENCES transects ("transect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wildlife_wild_surveyor_id FOREIGN KEY ("wild_surveyor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biodiversity" (
  "biod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biodiversity record */,
  "transect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transect (foreign key) */,
  "rich_all_species" REAL /* Species richness (total number of species) */,
  "evenness_all_species" REAL /* Evenness (measure of species distribution) */,
  "diversity_all_species" REAL /* Diversity (Shannon-Wiener index) */,
  "rich_bird_species" REAL /* Species richness for birds */,
  "evenness_bird_species" REAL /* Evenness for birds */,
  "diversity_bird_species" REAL /* Diversity for birds */,
  "rich_mammal_species" REAL /* Species richness for mammals */,
  "evenness_mammal_species" REAL /* Evenness for mammals */,
  "diversity_mammal_species" REAL /* Diversity for mammals */,
  "biod_date" TEXT /* Date when the biodiversity data was collected */,
  "biod_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the biodiversity */,
  "biod_surveyor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveyor who collected the data (foreign key to users table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biodiversity_transect_id FOREIGN KEY ("transect_id") REFERENCES transects ("transect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biodiversity_biod_surveyor_id FOREIGN KEY ("biod_surveyor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
